articles.title: Crypto Strategist Issues Alerts for Bitcoin and Chainlink, Says BTC Looking Heavy
articles.description: A crypto strategist known for making timely altcoin calls is warning that corrections are imminent for Bitcoin (BTC) and Chainlink (LINK). Pseudonymous analyst Altcoin Sherpa tells his 181,900 Twitter followers that Bitcoin is looking heavy after BTC retraced from about $21,800 to below $20,000 on Friday. “BTC: I think we’re probably going to go to […]

articles.title: Shiba Inu Slips in Rankings After Sell-Off
articles.description: Shiba Inu has lost several spots on CoinMarketCap after failing to sustain its bullish momentum

articles.title: Cardano Price Trajectory Signals Negative Bearing, Weekly Chart Mostly In Red
articles.description: The price movement of Cardano (ADA) has been in the negative direction, and the seven-day chart was predominantly red. ADA resistance key seen at the $0.4694 level Cardano price up by 3.74% Fed tensions negatively impacted crypto market; including ADA price Following a recent market correction, ADA encountered resistance at the $0.4694 level.
